description: CCCLeads is a verified lead database purpose-built for agencies targeting coaches, consultants, and course creators, with over 12 data points per contact.
tagline: Database of verified coaches and consultants
overview: CCCLeads provides a targeted, verified contact database focused exclusively on coaches, consultants, and course creators. Each record includes more than 12 data points and a confirmed email address, and contacts can be exported in a single click for immediate use in cold email or client acquisition campaigns.
what_is: CCCLeads is a lead database tool built specifically for businesses that sell to coaches, consultants, and course creators. It delivers verified contact records with more than 12 data points per entry, including confirmed email addresses, so users can start outreach without spending time cleaning or validating raw data. One-click export keeps the process simple and fast.

The platform is a strong fit for small agencies and individual professionals who need a reliable pool of pre-verified leads for cold email outreach and client acquisition. Because the leads are ready to export immediately after a search, teams can move from prospecting to campaign launch in a very short time, which is valuable when pipeline velocity matters.

CCCLeads functions as a dedicated data source within the GTM stack, feeding clean contact information into email sequences or CRM systems. It is not an email marketing platform or a full CRM, so it works best alongside separate tools that handle campaign execution, engagement tracking, and relationship management.
